text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
With the Triple Tiara behind us, Mejiro Dober
and I set our sights on the next race—the Arima
Kinen.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
It won't be an easy race, considering its distance
and the caliber of her opponents, but it will be a
great experience for her upcoming challenges.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I half expect Mejiro Dober to be nervous, but
instead, she's thrilled to be entering the same
race as her beloved upperclassman, Air Groove.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
A few days later, Mejiro Dober is surprised to
learn she placed third in the Arima Kinen's
pre-race popularity poll.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
While the other Mejiro members celebrate her
selection, Mejiro Dober vows to run a race worthy
of a new Mejiro legacy.
